findings.evidence: `Action.lean:131-133` proves `ContinuousConstSMul (relBoundary I M n) M` by `⟨fun f => f.1.continuous⟩`; `TauCeti/Topology/Algebra/HomeomorphAction.lean:56` already uses the analogous natural subgroup-level theorem for homeomorphisms.
findings.fix: Replace it with a general instance such as `Diffeomorph.applySubgroupContinuousConstSMul (H : Subgroup (Diff I M n)) : ContinuousConstSMul H M := ⟨fun f => f.1.continuous⟩`, deriving the boundary case by typeclass search.
findings.issue: `relBoundary.applyContinuousConstSMul` is unnecessarily special to the boundary-fixing subgroup; its proof uses only that an element is a diffeomorphism, not that it fixes `I.boundary M`.

summary: The boundary subgroup API leaves one continuity instance at a special-case level even though the proof and surrounding pattern support every subgroup of the diffeomorphism group.
